title: Care to Learn guidance
body: "  If you are a parent or guardian and need any help on student eligibility, please go to our Care to Learn page.   This guide is for organisations with young parents supported by the Care to Learn (C2L) scheme. C2L provides funding for childcare to help young parents (defined as those aged under 20) continue in education after the birth of a child.  The guide sets out the funding rules and application processes for C2L. Organisations must comply with the rules and must be able to show they comply with this guide at any audit. "

taxons.title: Financial help for students who are parents or carers
